docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-20-2025 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUN-11-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-20-2025 - SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY KENNETH TSANG, ESQ.; KATHLEEN CLARK, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT ALEJANDRA PEREZ. PLAINTIFF NOT READY FOR TRIAL. THE COURT DISMISSED THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
